UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile containing public info and saved cart state.

uid.description: Firebase Auth User UID matching the document ID.

email.description: Email address of the authenticated user.

cart.description: Synchronized items in the user's cart containing productId, quantity, and optional custom details.

updatedAt.description: Latest update timestamp synced from server request.time.

/users/{userId}.description: Individual user document containing metadata and cart persistence.
